---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What problem are you solving?

The user pain or workflow gap. Avoid jumping to a solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd build, in 2-3 sentences. Mention which user-facing surface it affects (bot factory, chat UI, dashboard, embed widget, public `/u/{username}` page, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you ruled them out.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] …
- [ ] …
- [ ] …

## Mockups / references

Screenshots, Figma links, or examples from other tools.

## Which stage does this belong to?

Check `claude/plan.md` for the 7-stage roadmap. If this proposal targets a stage that's already shipped, say so; if it targets one in flight, note which one.

- [ ] Stage 1 - Foundation + auth + BYO-key chat _(shipped)_
- [ ] Stage 2 - PDF + URL ingestion
- [ ] Stage 3 - RAG + vector search
- [ ] Stage 4 - Public `/u/[username]/chat` + conversation logging
- [ ] Stage 5 - Embeddable widget
- [ ] Stage 6 - Dashboard + analytics + lead capture + in-app notifications
- [ ] Stage 7 - OAuth + email verify + landing + GDPR + self-host
- [ ] Cross-cutting / not stage-specific
